known_issues: Live/production deployment results in an application error; user expected going live to save the app permanently

existing_features.title: Diagnose and fix the application error that occurs when the app is accessed in the live/production environment. The app must load without any runtime or initialization errors for all users (authenticated and anonymous).

Ensure the frontend handles cases where the backend actor is not yet ready or returns an error during initialization, displaying a user-friendly loading or error state instead of a blank/broken screen.

new_feature_requests.summary: Ensure the backend migration module (migration.mo) is correctly applied on canister upgrade so that existing state (including the old single `subgroup` field) is properly transformed to the new `scienceSubgroup` and `commerceSubgroup` fields without causing a trap or error during post-upgrade.

projectName: Fix application error in live/production deployment
